# vmnet_mtu_key | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ vmnet ](/documentation/vmnet)

- [ vmnet_mtu_key ](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_mtu_key)

-  vmnet_mtu_key 

Global Variable# vmnet_mtu_key

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.10+

```
let vmnet_mtu_key: UnsafePointer<CChar>
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/vmnet/vmnet_mtu_key#Discussion)

The MTU to be configured on the virtual interface in the guest operating system.

The value for this key is of type [`XPC_TYPE_UINT64`](/documentation/XPC/XPC_TYPE_UINT64-swift.var).
